diagnostics: Contract mismatch: GET /health or project list path throws unexpectedly (500). Check route-service method wiring and avoid generic INTERNAL_ERROR fallbacks.
Contract mismatch: project read/list operations must not return 500; verify projectsService methods called by routes exist and return expected data.
Contract mismatch: Duplicate member add (same userId in one project) must return HTTP 409 with error payload.
Contract mismatch: avoid swallowing domain/service contract errors as generic INTERNAL_ERROR 500 responses.
Contract mismatch: API must never return HTML error pages; return JSON error payloads even on failures.
